videos.headline: Big man TD! BC's Ty Clemons gets the pick-six
videos.description: Boston College defensive lineman Ty Clemons snags the tipped pass and takes it to the house for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Big man TD! BC’s Ty Clemons gets the pick-six) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: BC's Reed Harris makes fantastic TD grab
videos.description: Boston College goes up 27-17 in the third quarter as Reed Harris goes up and makes the stellar touchdown catch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (BC’s Reed Harris makes fantastic TD grab) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: BC's Jordan McDonald breaks through the hole for a TD
videos.description: Boston College gets out to a lead as Jordan McDonald finds the end zone from 36 yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (BC’s Jordan McDonald breaks through the hole for a TD) 2024/11/30 ESHEET
